basics.name: Corbet Griffith
basics.label: Technical Product Manager
basics.summary: Seasoned technical leader with over 10 years of expertise driving digital initiatives, complex data transformations, and API integrations for enterprise brands like Ford, Reuters, and VML. Proven track record of managing end-to-end product lifecycles, optimizing IT processes, and aligning cross-functional global teams using agile methodologies. Skilled in leveraging SQL and data analytics to drive strategic product decisions while ensuring strict enterprise compliance.

work.name: TerrAscend
highlights: Managed the end-to-end API and data integration of enterprise platforms including Azure, Snowflake, Epicor, and Power BI.

Ensured seamless data connectivity and strict SOX/Legal compliance across all operational markets during technical deployments of key enterprise platforms including Azure, Snowflake, Epicor, and Wherefour.
Led requirements gathering with executive stakeholders to develop customized Power BI applications, dashboards, and reports, aligning analytics with critical business insights.

work.name: Jackson Dawson
highlights: Oversaw the product integration of web technologies and APIs, including AWS, Google Analytics, Shopify, and Tableau, ensuring compliance with Ford's data privacy policies.
Worked with cross-functional teams and Ford leaders to gather technical and functional requirements, creating user stories and acceptance criteria in Azure DevOps.
Implemented a streamlined issue tracking process that reduced response turnaround time from one week to 24 hours.

Oversaw product integration of web technologies & APIs, including Google Analytics, AWS, Shopify, Mailchimp, Mandrill, FileMaker, Smartsheet, and Tableau while ensuring compliance with Ford data & SOX privacy policies.

work.name: VML
highlights: Gathered technical requirements and prioritized user stories in Jira, enabling developers to efficiently iterate on complex enterprise programs for Ford.
Streamlined product announcement updates in Adobe Experience Cloud, reducing deployment time from 15 days down to within three days.
Managed targeted email campaigns and product deployments using Adobe Experience Manager and data analytics, resulting in a 10% uplift in associated revenue.

work.name: Garden State Flower Cooperative
highlights: Gathered business requirements through interviews, participatory design sessions, and journey mapping to better understand problems associated with the co-op’s existing pre-order process and how it could be improved.

Wrote functional and technical requirements for a new pre-order process & app, helping address specific pain points and improve the experience for all stakeholders, including program administrators, farmers, and buyers.

Created and presented Standard Operating Procedures and training documentation for administrators, farmers, and buyers for the new CRM platform, cutting onboarding time for new administrators in half.

work.name: Thomson Reuters
highlights: Wrote and executed SQL scripts to perform advanced data analysis, delivering data-driven insights that drove key business decisions & internal processes.
Led discovery sessions to develop technical requirements specifications and acceptance criteria for new software functionality for upcoming agile sprints.

education.area: Focus on #ux User Experience Research & Design
